title: Modern CDS View Entity syntax — `define view entity` /
description: Modern CDS View Entity syntax — `define view entity` /. Key topics: `define view entity` drops the mandatory @AbapCatalog.sqlViewName. `define root view entity` marks the view as a RAP root node,. `define view entity` (non-root) is used for reusable association.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆`define view entity` drops the mandatory @AbapCatalog.sqlViewName
◆`define root view entity` marks the view as a RAP root node,
◆`define view entity` (non-root) is used for reusable association
◆All existing CDS annotations (@Semantics, @Analytics, etc.)
◆View entities integrate natively with RAP BOs, OData V4, and
◆Using view entities is forward-compatible — SAP recommends this

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆`define view entity` drops the mandatory @AbapCatalog.sqlViewName
◆`define root view entity` marks the view as a RAP root node,
◆`define view entity` (non-root) is used for reusable association
◆All existing CDS annotations (@Semantics, @Analytics, etc.)
◆View entities integrate natively with RAP BOs, OData V4, and
◆Using view entities is forward-compatible — SAP recommends this

CDS Source Code

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS View Entity — modern syntax'
define root view entity ZPRAC_CDS_VIEW_ENTITY
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  key travel_id     as TravelId,
      agency_id     as AgencyId,
      customer_id   as CustomerId,
      begin_date    as BeginDate,
      end_date      as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price   as TotalPrice,
      @Semantics.currencyCode: true
      currency_code as CurrencyCode,
      description   as Description
}
details:
— the CDS entity name IS the runtime SQL view name.

enabling transactional behaviour in OData / Fiori apps.

views or composition children.

work identically with the view-entity syntax.

later EML without wrapper views.

syntax for all new developments.

COMPARISON — Old vs New Syntax:

--- OLD: define view with sqlViewName ---

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_OLD_SIMPLE'

define view ZPRAC_CDS_SIMPLE

as select from /dmo/travel { ... }

--- NEW: define view entity (no sqlViewName) ---

define root view entity ZPRAC_CDS_VIEW_ENTITY

as select from /dmo/travel { ... }
topic: CDS View Entity — modern replacement for `define view`
